rows.label: tev025602_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, are you here to get some
advice from Himeri? So sorry, but
we're booked solid for the day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025602_MSG0002
rows.name:
Himeri would work right through
dawn if no one stopped her, so I
have to step in and draw the line.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025602_MSG0003
rows.name:
No hard feelings, okay? Come back the next
time we start taking appointments and I
promise we'll take good care of you.[ST:wait ]
